[1:a]aloop=loop=-1:size=2147483647,volume=-12.5dB,afade=t=in:st=0:d=1.25:curve=exp[r0];[2:a]aloop=loop=-1:size=2147483647,volume=-12.5dB,afade=t=in:st=0:d=1.25:curve=exp[r1];[r0][r1]amix=inputs=2:normalize=1[rainmix];[0:a][rainmix]amix=inputs=2:duration=longest:normalize=1[mixed];[mixed]loudnorm=I=-16:LRA=8:TP=-2:print_format=json[aout]
